name: algolia
description: Reads Algolia indices, API keys, index settings, dictionaries, security sources, and logs, and writes index settings/API keys, through the Algolia Search REST API.

risk.read: external Algolia API read of index/key/dictionary/security/log configuration metadata
risk.write: external mutation: overwrites live index search settings (update_index_settings) or creates a new standing API key credential (create_api_key); approval required
